characters.name: Aunt Ruth
characters.description: Aunt Ruth. Aunt Ruthis Bobby's aunt and Martha and Ted's sister. (voice ofEdie McClurg) She made her debut in "My Visit to Aunt Ruth's".  She's a full-figured lady with a sweet, pretty face and kindly ways. She's affectionate toward her small nephew and particularly loves to pinch his cheeks, which Bobby really doesn't like very much. She wears her hair in a bun and part of her trademark attire is knee-high stockings rolled into a ring at the cuffs.

characters.name: Derek Generic
characters.description: Derek Generic. Derek Genericis Bobby's 10-year-old brother, with a rat-tail hairdo and a sarcastic manner. He absolutely loves horror movies and skateboarding. He always calls Bobby names, such as "Dork," "Pea-brain", and "Dweeb," (voiced by Kevin Smets seasons 1-5  ,Pamela Segallseason 6-7 and Zachary Gordons in Bobby's World 2.) Bobby's bad habit is that he keeps listening to Derek's lies and cruel jokes and Bobby doesn't learn his lesson and needs to stop listening to Derek.

characters.name: Eric gengic
characters.description: Eric Appears In New Adventures of Bobby (a possible Revival of Bobby's World), Eric Is the nasty 12-Years Old  Grandson ofMr gengic(the cranky old neighbor of the generics), He loves to BullyingBobbyandDerek Generic, Making mean pranks of Them, Like chocolate bunny with Lataxive (in Easter Special), The smell of feet (Even thought Derek says "the smell of defeat" when He argues with Bobby with the Basketball game and Eric make the joke of the smell of the feet and He puts a skunk over both), and and grabs their shirt collar, For surprise as much his grandfather hates them, Eric takes advantage of them. He is only characters with dyed hair, having green hair with reddish streak Eric's voice actor is Billy west (Roger Klotz from Doug). Talking In Fact, He and Roger has something in common Both has leather jackets,their signature is green and has two victims to bullying (Doug and Skeeter are Roger's Favorite Targets and Eric loves to Torment Bobby and Derek, Both has Pet, Roger has his Cat Stinky and Eric has his alligatorRojas, The difference is That Eric is irredimible and Roger become Doug's friend)

characters.name: Jackie
characters.description: Jackie is Bobby's girlfriend/next-door-neighbor who likes to kiss him. Jackie has red hair with floor-length pigtails with light green elastics with long bangs and has baby blue eyes. Jackie wears gold ball-like studded earrings, a bubblegum-pink short-sleeved shirt, a light green miniskirt, a white bandage on her left knee, bubblegum-pink socks and reddish-brown loafers. Jackie makes her first appearance in season 2.

characters.name: Kelly Generic
characters.description: Kelly Genericis Bobby's 14-year-old sister and the eldest, sporting a shaghaircut, purpleeye shadowand avalley girlaccent/demeanor and often speaks with her catch phrase "Get real!" She is also very obsessed with her boyfriend George. She is usually mean to bobby but she fells undifferent to him, and  Derek always annoys her.(voiced by Charity James and then by Robyn Rhianna Fenty in Bobby's World 2.) Kelly Generic.

characters.name: Martha Generic
characters.description: Martha Genericis Bobby's mother, who speaks with a heavyNorth Central American EnglishScandinavianaccent, in stereotypical Minnesotan/Great Lakes style, and often punctuates her speech with phrases like "Fer corn sakes", "Fer cryin' in the mud", "gee golly", "gosh darn" and "don't 'cha know". (voiced byGail Matthius). She's simple-minded and she's not very smart.

characters.name: Uncle Ted
characters.description: Uncle Tedis Martha and Ruth's brother, Howard's brother-in-law and the maternal uncle of Kelly, Derek, and Bobby. He loves to givenoogiesto Bobby and is a collector of various things, one of which is a novelty item called Socks In A Can. (voice ofTino Insana) Uncle Ted. Most of the Generic family disrespects him on account that his attitude is too immature for a man of his age. However, Bobby loves him as the two have common ground.
